articles.title: This Boston College student is running Boston for the BPL
articles.description:
"The Boston Public Library is a place where I didn’t compete for attention, didn’t hide behind my siblings, and didn’t pretend to be someone else."

The post This Boston College student is running Boston for the BPL appeared first on Boston.com.
